title: The Artemis II mission has ended. Where does NASA go from here?
summary: The Artemis II mission has concluded successfully, bringing astronauts home from the Moon. NASA leadership is now focused on planning the next phases of lunar exploration, emphasizing that the challenges ahead will be greater than those already overcome.
content: "The work ahead is greater than the work behind us."

zh.title: 阿尔特弥斯二号任务已结束，美国宇航局接下来何去何从？
zh.summary: 阿尔特弥斯二号任务已成功结束，将宇航员送回月球。美国宇航局领导层现在专注于规划下一阶段的月球探索，强调未来的挑战将比已经克服的挑战更大。

title: Four astronauts are back home after a daring ride around the Moon
summary: Four astronauts have successfully returned home after completing a lunar mission around the Moon, with mission personnel praising the crew's flawless execution of the complex maneuver. The successful return marks a milestone for NASA's human spaceflight program.
content: "I can't imagine a better crew that just completed a perfect mission right now."

zh.title: 四名宇航员在绕月飞行冒险后平安返回地球
zh.summary: 四名宇航员在完成环月任务后已成功返回地球，任务人员称赞了机组人员对复杂操纵的完美执行。成功返回标志着美国宇航局人类太空飞行计划的一个里程碑。

title: NASA Artemis II splashes down in Pacific Ocean in ‘perfect’ landing for Moon mission
summary: The Artemis II spacecraft achieved a successful splashdown in the Pacific Ocean off the coast of San Diego, executing a 'perfect' landing after the crew's lunar mission. The precise reentry and landing demonstrate NASA's technological capability for safely returning human crews from deep space.
content: The Integrity craft splashed down in the Pacific Ocean off the coast of San Diego just after 5:07 p.m. Pacific Time.

zh.title: 美国宇航局阿尔特弥斯二号在太平洋实现"完美"着陆
zh.summary: 阿尔特弥斯二号航天器在圣地亚哥沿岸太平洋成功溅落，在机组完成月球任务后实现了"完美"着陆。精准的再入和着陆展示了美国宇航局安全将人类机组从深空送回的技术能力。
